mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (session_id, table_id, customer_phone, status, total_amount) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{tableId}, #{customerPhone}, #{status}, #{totalAmount})
INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, menu_id, menu_name, price, quantity) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{menuId}, #{menuName}, #{price}, #{quantity})

INSERT INTO payment (session_id, status, final_amount, payment_key, order_id_toss, method, raw_response, approved_at) VALUES (#{sessionId}, 'READY', #{finalAmount}, #{paymentKey}, #{orderIdToss}, #{method}, #{rawResponse}, #{approvedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE payment SET status = 'DONE', paid_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND status = 'READY'
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, status, final_amount, payment_key, order_id_toss, method, raw_response, approved_at, paid_at FROM payment WHERE payment_key = #{paymentKey} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, session_id, table_id, customer_phone, status, total_amount, ordered_at FROM orders WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY ordered_at DESC
SELECT id, session_id, table_id, customer_phone, status, total_amount, ordered_at FROM orders WHERE table_id = #{tableId} ORDER BY ordered_at DESC LIMIT 1
